documents.title: GitHub - nikitabobko/AeroSpace: AeroSpace is an i3-like tiling window manager for macOS
documents.description: AeroSpace is an i3-like tiling window manager for macOS - nikitabobko/AeroSpace
documents.summary: AeroSpace is an i3-inspired tiling window manager for macOS that uses a tree-based paradigm and its own virtual workspace emulation to provide fast, keyboard-centric window management.

documents.title: AeroSpace Guide
documents.summary: This document explains the configuration system for the AeroSpace window manager, detailing how custom settings interact with default values and providing a comprehensive reference for TOML configuration keys.

documents.title: AeroSpace Commands
documents.summary: This document provides a technical reference for AeroSpace CLI query commands used to inspect the current state of configurations, applications, monitors, and windows.

documents.title: AeroSpace Goodies
documents.summary: A collection of community-contributed tips, automations, and configuration snippets for the AeroSpace tiling window manager on macOS.
